params.name: Species Plantarum
params.description:
On Apr 15, 1753 AD, Linnaeus' book, which had taken him seven years to complete, was published.
Linnaeus, a Swedish biologist, wrote Species Plantarum. He gathered a large number of plant samples and used the binomial nomenclature system to classify and name them. This book marks the beginning of modern taxonomy and is vital to future biological research.
